settings.title: Carry White Sparrow Farmacy -- Wholesale Information

settings.text:
We're a small-batch, 100% grass-fed tallow skincare brand based on a family farm in Idaho. Our products are clean-label, preservative-free, and designed for customers with sensitive, dry, or reactive skin who've tried conventional moisturizers and found them lacking.

We're currently available through Faire Marketplace where you can place your first wholesale order with 50% off, free shipping for one year, and 60-day payment terms -- the most flexible wholesale terms available in our category.

settings.title: 60-day payment terms -- pay after your customers do
Faire terms
settings.text: These terms are applied automatically when you order through our Faire storefront. No code required, no negotiation needed.

settings.title: Prefer to buy direct?
settings.text: If you'd prefer to buy direct or have questions about our wholesale program, contact us or request a line sheet.
